title: MET 2026 Slot Booking - Overview

detail.title: MET 2026 Slot Booking - Overview
detail.short_info: MET 2026 slot booking link is now active for Phase 1. Log in with your MET application number and OTBS password to book Manipal Entrance Test exam date and time online. Check slot booking dates, steps and hall ticket details here.

content.text: MET 2026 Slot Booking Link Out means the Manipal Entrance Test 2026 Phase 1 slot booking window is now live, and eligible candidates can log in to the OTBS portal using their application number and password to choose their exam date, time and test city.

MET slot booking is a mandatory step for candidates who have registered for the Manipal Entrance Test 2026. Through OTBS (Online Test Booking System), students can pick their preferred exam date and time within the available window.

MET 2026 Slot Booking Link Out means the Manipal Entrance Test 2026 Phase 1 slot booking window is now live, and eligible candidates can log in to the OTBS portal using their application number and password to choose their exam date, time and test city. MET 2026 Slot Booking - Overview MET slot booking is a mandatory step for candidates who have registered for the Manipal Entrance Test 2026. Through OTBS (Online Test Booking System), students can pick their preferred exam date and time within the available window.

rows: Admission to BTech and other programmes at Manipal institutions
Online via OTBS (Online Test Booking System)
Slots are allotted on a first-come, first-served basis and cannot be changed once booked

sections.heading: MET 2026 Slot Booking Link and Login Details

content.text: The MET 2026 slot booking link is hosted on the MAHE OTBS (Online Test Booking System) and typically redirects from the official Manipal website.
Where to Find the MET 2026 Slot Booking Link

items: Visit the official Manipal website (manipal.edu) and open the MET 2026 exam/OTBS section.
Use the active OTBS login URL (for example, the configured HTML link on cdn.digialm.com shared in official notices and result/slot booking pages).
Ensure you are on a secure, official link before entering any credentials.

sections.heading: How to Book MET 2026 Exam Slots (Phase 1)

content.text: Candidates must complete slot booking within the specified window to choose their preferred MET 2026 exam date and time.
Step-by-Step MET 2026 Slot Booking Process

items: Open the OTBS portal Visit the MET 2026 OTBS login link (such as the cdn.digialm.com configured login page) through the official Manipal site or notification.
Log in to OTBS Enter your MET 2026 application number and OTBS password. First-time users should log in with the default DOB-based password and then create a new password.
Check candidate details Verify your name, application number, programme and other details shown on the dashboard. If anything is incorrect, contact the MET helpdesk before proceeding.
Click on “Book Slot” / “Book a Seat” Go to the slot booking section and click the button to start the booking process.
Select test city, date and time Choose your test city from the available options, then pick a suitable exam date and time slot from the list of available slots.
Confirm your slot Carefully review the selected city, date and timing. Once confirmed, the slot cannot be changed, so ensure you choose wisely.
Save your booking details After confirmation, take a screenshot or note your booked exam date, time and city. These details will appear again on your MET 2026 hall ticket.

content.text: Booking early in the window helps increase your chances of getting your preferred slot and centre.

sections.heading: MET 2026 Slot Booking Dates and Exam Schedule

content.text: Candidates should be aware of the complete timeline for slot booking, admit card and exam.
MET 2026 Slot Booking and Exam Timeline

rows: From around 11:00 AM on 31 March 2026 (as per official schedule)

content.text: Only certain candidates can access OTBS for slot booking.
Who Can Book a MET 2026 Slot?

items: Candidates who have completed MET 2026 registration and paid the exam fee successfully.
Candidates whose application status is showing as submitted/accepted on the MET portal.
There is no separate fee for slot booking; it is included in the exam process.

content.text: If your application is incomplete or rejected, you will not be able to log in to OTBS for slot booking.

sections.heading: MET 2026 Hall Ticket After Slot Booking

content.text: Slot booking is directly linked to hall ticket generation.
How and When to Download MET 2026 Admit Card

items: After slot booking, candidates can download the MET 2026 hall ticket from 10 April 2026 to 13 April 2026 for Phase 1.
Hall tickets are available through the OTBS login or MET exam page using your application number and OTBS password.
The admit card contains exam date, time, test centre address, reporting time, and important exam-day instructions.

content.text: Candidates must carry a printed hall ticket and a valid photo ID to the exam centre; entry is not allowed without these.

sections.heading: Important Instructions for MET 2026 Slot Booking

content.text: To avoid mistakes and issues, candidates should follow these guidelines while booking slots.
Key Guidelines for OTBS

items: No changes after confirmation: Once you confirm a slot, you cannot change the date, time or centre later.
First-come, first-served: Popular cities and time slots can fill up quickly; book early to increase your chances of getting your preferred slot.
Single login session: Use a stable internet connection and avoid logging in from multiple devices at the same time.
Check time zones: Ensure you understand the time mentioned on the portal and confirm the slot according to your local time and availability.
Keep login details safe: Do not share your OTBS password with others; always log out after completing booking or download.

content.text: If you miss the slot booking window, the system or authority may auto-assign a slot, or you may lose the chance to choose your preferences.

sections.heading: Official Links for MET 2026 Slot Booking and Exam

content.text: Candidates should always rely on official websites and links to book slots and download hall tickets.
Important MET 2026 Links

items: Manipal University Official Website: Click Here
MET 2026 OTBS Slot Booking / Result Login Link: Click Here The configured OTBS login URL on cdn.digialm.com (as provided in official communication and result/slot booking links).
